metadata.title:
Reform Forces at


Work In Tacoma.

pages.raw_text:
TACOMA, March 17.-While the
democratic party is practically elm
mated from the fight in the coming
municipal campaign, the election still
promises to be as exciting a one as
the city has seen for years. Anew
element has entered the political field
in the form of an aggregation of
citizens led collectively by the min
listers Of the city and the Women's
Christian Temperance union. The
forces coming the new movement held
their first meeting at the First Meth
odist church last night.


Up to the closing of the registra-
ton books last night $500 voters had
registered. Citizens have paid but
little attention to registering until the
past two or three days, interest in the
election having lately been stirred by
the prospective citizens ticket.
